creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #7)
I've just done a run with that patch included and I see the same panic.
It does need 'net.fibs=3' to trigger. That might be because the triggering test is sys/netinet/fibs_test:slaac_on_nondefault_fib6 which requires that to run.
